top_signals.title: Opening Remarks by Commissioner Kadis at the European Maritime Day 2026 in Limassol, Cyprus
top_signals.summary:
European Commission Speech Limassol, 21 May 2026 Deputy Minister Hadjimanolis, Mayor Armeftis, dear colleagues and friends of the maritime community, ladies and gentlemen,
It is an honour to address you today ...
